selected_issues.title: [cellscore] Core MVP — address coverage checker, plan recommender, plan comparison
selected_issues.reason: P0 — RESELECTED 4th consecutive cycle. FINAL CHANCE before human escalation. CONTINUE FROM MERGED WIP PR #362. Three SPECIFIC gaps to close — scope worker to ONLY these: (1) implement /api/coverage/check route that queries coverage data by lat/lng, (2) route affiliate links through /api/affiliate/click tracking endpoint instead of direct external links, (3) integrate Mapbox geocoder component for address input on the coverage checker page. All other CellScore features already work — plan DB seeded (#346), plan comparison page shipped (#361). CellScore only 10 PRs merged (most underinvested active product). Worker MUST create new branch from main and focus on these 3 gaps only — do NOT refactor or touch other files.

selected_issues.title: [billwatch] Affiliate tracking endpoint — energy provider + solar referral click tracking
selected_issues.reason: P0 — RESELECTED 4th consecutive cycle. FINAL CHANCE before human escalation. Click tracking is the revenue measurement bridge: without it, billwatch cannot attribute or measure ANY affiliate revenue. Unblocks #335 (solar recommendation engine — EnergySage $25-100/sale, SunPower $75/lead). Worker must check existing /api/affiliate/ routes in billwatch/src/app/api/ and complete the tracking endpoint. Pattern: POST /api/affiliate/click with provider slug, redirect URL, user session → log to affiliate_clicks table → redirect. Same pattern as ScoreRebound's working affiliate tracking. Worker MUST focus ONLY on the click endpoint — do NOT build the solar rec engine or dashboard.

selected_issues.title: [afterloss] Build programmatic SEO pages for 50 states (probate, small-estate, death-certificate)
selected_issues.reason: P0 — NEWLY UNBLOCKED. Blocker #253 (50-state probate DB seed) COMPLETED via PR #363, closed 2026-03-19. Data foundation is now ready in probate_rules table. This issue creates 150+ state-specific SEO pages: /states/[state]/probate, /states/[state]/small-estate, /states/[state]/death-certificate. Each page renders state-specific probate rules, filing deadlines, court info from the seeded data. Massive organic traffic opportunity — long-tail searches like 'probate process in Texas' or 'California small estate affidavit'. AfterLoss has 94 PRs merged (most mature product), adding SEO pages is the next step toward affiliate revenue conversion. Template pattern: dynamic route + SSG with generateStaticParams for all 50 states + DC.
